The '''''Resolute''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

After the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], it responded to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack on a convoy consisting of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] ''[[M-S]]'' and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]s ''[[Epsilon (disambiguation)|Epsilon]]'', but it arrived too late, as over half of the convoy had already been destroyed. [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] that had attacked the convoy turned on this starship afterwards.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Resolute'' first appeared in the second bonus mission, "Destroy Troop Convoy," of the [[1994]] Collector Edition of the [[1993]] computer game [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']].
